task: Add CLAUDE.md Prerequisites section documenting the poetry global install requirement and diagnostic command so contributors understand why the Stop hook's make ruff target fails in non-login subshells.

key_reasoning.reason: Single documentation file (CLAUDE.md) — no architectural layer boundaries crossed, no code components involved.

Root cause fully diagnosed: poetry not in PATH of non-login subshells. Fix is precisely specified: add Prerequisites section to CLAUDE.md with diagnostic command and remediation guidance. Zero ambiguity.
